name: 2-Day Tour: Casablanca → Chefchaouen Round Trip

seo.title: 2-Day Casablanca → Chefchaouen Tour — Blue City | Authentic Morocco Tours
seo.description: Private 2-day tour from Casablanca: round trip to Chefchaouen, Morocco's famous Blue City in the Rif mountains. Overnight stay, exploring the blue medina.

hero.tagline: Casablanca → Chefchaouen: the Blue City in 2 days

intro: This 2-day tour takes you from Casablanca to Chefchaouen, the famous 'Blue City' of the Rif. One night on site to enjoy the blue alleyways at dawn and sunset, then return the next day. Ideal for short trips from Casablanca or Rabat.
